---
title: "Home"
listing: false
---

::::: hero
::: hero-text
[Marketing · Promotional Marketing · Consumer Behavior]{.eyebrow}

# Savannah Ventic

I am pursuing a degree in marketing with a concentration in promotional marketing. I am interested in a career focused on consumer behavior or advertising, where I can use creativity, strategy, and audience insights to help brands connect with people.

[View My Work](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [Resume](resume.qmd){.btn .btn-outline}
:::

::: hero-card
## ![](images/clipboard-628559299.jpeg)

I enjoy turning information into clear, useful insights that support stronger marketing strategies and better business decisions.

-   Marketing analytics
-   Consumer behavior
-   Advertising strategy
-   Promotional campaigns
-   Data visualization
:::
:::::

::::::: section
## Featured Work

:::::: cards
::: card
### Marketing Projects

Explore projects focused on data analysis, consumer insights, and data-driven decision making using tools like R and Quarto.

[View Projects](projects.qmd)
:::

::: card
### Dashboard

A space to showcase dashboards, visualizations, and performance metrics.

[View Dashboard](dashboard.qmd)
:::

::: card
### Presentation

A breif Quarto RevealJS presentation highlighting the importance of understand consumer behavior.

[View Presentation](presentation.qmd)
:::
::::::
:::::::

::: {.section .soft}
## About This Portfolio

This website is designed for future employers, instructors, and professional connections. It highlights my education, skills, projects, and interest in marketing roles related to digital marketing, consumer behavior, and advertising.
:::
